# amirlan kalmukhan

> 15 y/o founder and ai engineer from astana, kazakhstan.

## who i am

amirlan kalmukhan is a 15-year-old founder and ai engineer based in astana, kazakhstan.
he is cto and co-founder of agent4 labs, where he builds agentic ai systems and autonomous
web infrastructure.

## current work

- **agent4 labs** (cto & co-founder, 2026–present): building extensy and nex. turned down
  a safe from a plug and play affiliated accelerator.
- **white hill capital** (ai engineer, 2026–present): building internal agentic pipelines
  for venture due diligence at a ~$50m aum vc firm.

## past work

- **xcellence robotics lab** (lead engineer, 2025–2026): led engineering team for
  FIRST Robotics Central Asia. won robot performance and modular design awards.
- **nazarbayev university** (researcher, 2025): research on ai and nanomaterials
  (nac carbon dots). applied ml to materials characterization data.

## products

- **extensy** (live): describe an idea, get a chrome extension, ship it. https://extensy.dev
- **nex** (building): search and execution api for ai agents. https://nex.extensy.dev
- **sidekick** (building): agentic build engine for executing product work end-to-end.
- **archer mcp** (building): event-driven mcp infrastructure for autonomous agents.
- **aztek** (building): visual dashboard for multi-agent swarm coordination.
- **archaiq** (experiment): offline voice ai pipeline for the kazakh language.
- **amir ai** (experiment): personal reasoning system built on private context.
